nodes.label: Behavioral tests for WebUI memory-provider session lifecycle.  Batch-extraction
Import/reload lifecycle module and clear process-global test state.
_evict_session_agent() must attempt a lifecycle commit before dropping     the c
LRU eviction must collect under SESSION_AGENT_CACHE_LOCK and commit only     aft
Clearing a session must not hold the per-session mutation lock while     evictin
Source-adjacent test: verify post-turn lifecycle only calls     mark_turn_comple
Behavioral test: repeated completed turns accumulate without commit,     and a s
All lifecycle API functions must no-op safely for falsy session IDs.
